finding_results.notes: Kept the August 17, 2002 account as Martin's immediate record of the fire, then marked the coroner and fire-investigation details as later darker-ink additions so the document no longer reads like a single same-day plot memo.
Replaced the dossier-style age/job/family summary with a compressed Cliff-specific calculation about Tommy's public suburban standing and what scandal would cost him.
Changed Cliff's estimate of the clipped cash stack to 'just under two thousand dollars' so it aligns with Paul's later $1,960 count.

summary: Revised Chapter 8 to separate the RT document's immediate 2002 confession from later official-findings addenda, cut Tommy's redundant dossier re-introduction, and brought Cliff's safe-cash estimate into continuity with the later count.
